background_type.description: Background type: 'rgba', 'map', 'green', 'white', [R,G,B] array, 'blur', 'overlay', or path to an image.
background_type.title: Background Type

format.description: Output format (e.g., png, jpg). Defaults to png.
format.title: Format

reverse.description: If True, remove the foreground instead of the background.
reverse.title: Reverse

threshold.description: Threshold for hard segmentation (0.0-1.0). If 0.0, uses soft alpha.
threshold.title: Threshold
